parameters.query: SELECT t.*, COUNT(d.id) as deliverables_count, COUNT(c.id) as campaigns_count FROM targets t LEFT JOIN deliverables d ON d.target_id = t.id LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON c.project_id = t.project_id WHERE t.project_id = 'TNG-NEXUS-2026' GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.score DESC

parameters.name: htmlContent
parameters.value:
Export données NEXUS 2026

Date: {{ $json.timestamp }}

Nombre de targets: {{ $json.count }}

Le fichier CSV est disponible sur la plateforme.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO run_logs (run_id, workflow_id, workflow_name, status, result, started_at, completed_at) VALUES ($1, 'WF-11', 'Archive & Export', 'completed', $2, NOW(), NOW())

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, exported: $('Formater CSV').first().json.count, filename: $('Formater CSV').first().json.filename, sent_to: 't.primesynergy@gmail.com' }) }}
